data.name: Love n Life: Happy Student
data.detailed_description:
💘愛與生活：幸福學生💘

在Reborn Entertainment，創意驅動一切，我們致力於為玩家帶來全新的遊戲體驗。對我們而言，遊玩樂趣不只是目標，更是原則。

⭐ 主要特色

  • 透過獨特的物品管理系統體驗約會，共有300多種獨特道具。

  • 攻略5位主線女主角和3位支線角色，解鎖超過100張精美插畫，沉浸在40多個令人心動的浪漫時刻中。

  • 美麗女孩透過Live2D動畫生動呈現。

  • 海量劇情內容與隱藏秘密等你探索，包含超過200個獨特事件。

  • 小遊戲：烹飪、釣魚、運動、閱讀等應有盡有。

  • 善用遊戲內的手機功能，透過社群App、簡訊互動、收藏功能、拍照以及音樂播放器，與她們隨時保持聯繫。

⭐ 創新玩法

史無前例地將物品管理與戀愛模擬融合，帶來前所未有的獨特體驗。

你的道具不只是擺設。它們會影響你在每次對話中的表現，幫助你贏得芳心，帶來前所未有的心動體驗。每位你遇到的人物都有獨特的技能與說服方式。做好準備，應對每一個挑戰。

掌握一種特質：自信、魅力、親和力或學識，帶來極高的重複可玩性。每種特質都能解鎖300多種擁有豐富屬性的強力道具。嘗試、組合、創造，打造充滿策略快感的精彩曲風。這款令人上癮的核心玩法，保證帶來無數小時的娛樂體驗。

⭐ 故事

你是住在郊區的大三學生。通過競爭激烈的考試後，你幸運地轉入了位於近海小島上的名校——凌雲大學。這所大學擁有最先進的科技，常與大型企業簽訂重大專案合約。同時，校內也隱藏著許多秘密與未被揭開的劇情，等待你探索。

⭐ 浪漫

你來到這裡，是為了獲取寶貴的學識…對吧？但當女生們無法抗拒你的魅力時，可別感到意外。遊戲中有超過40段浪漫邂逅，每一段都比上一段更誘人，你將沉醉於這些比課本精彩百倍的心動時刻。如果你夠大膽深入探索，或許還能發現課堂上永遠不會教的隱藏樂趣。

⭐ 社交活動

當然，生活不只是約會和聊天。你也需要休息，我們完全理解。這裡有許多有趣的活動等你參與，

例如玩遊戲、運動、釣魚、美術課等等，不僅能提升你的各項屬性，更重要的是，能拉近你和女孩們之間的關係。

⭐ 女士們:

 劉雅婷 - 大學生

與你同班的一位女士，美麗，無憂無慮，喜歡探索新鮮事物。她將是你最好的朋友。

💘 秦依琳 - 學生會會長

「只有紀律和知識才能鑄就精英，沒有它們，你就只是一粒草芥」

學生會主席，優雅、選擇秩序，她不相信的手段推動他們成為最大潛力。

💘 陳美玲 - 文學教授

學校的文學溫柔與宿管，個性、老師和家管潑。是男生們的「夢中情師」！

💘 露娜-3X - 虛擬助理

她負責管理你的行程，並提醒你需要完成的重要任務。她還會幫你處理那些不宜見光的「隱秘事務」……當然，是以她那充滿「故障感」的獨特個性。

💘 咖啡店女老闆

她是你的避風港，為你提供一方寧靜的淨土。在這裡，你可以卸下身為男人所背負的沉重壓力，享受片刻的安寧。

💘 還有那些神祕的女孩們

這座島嶼充滿驚喜，而女孩們就是最大的驚喜。她們會迷住你、讓你困惑，甚至偶爾嚇你一跳……

同時把你捲入她們那甜蜜又混亂的謎團之中。你的生活不僅會被徹底顛覆，還會變得更瘋狂…

data.short_description: 《愛與生活：幸福學生》是一款獨具風格的戀愛模擬遊戲，系列首次融入了庫存管理系統。你是一名大三學生，因成績頂尖被選中進入最負盛名的學院深造，在這裡你將邂逅美麗的女生們，了解她們迷人的個性，探索校園裡隱藏的秘密。
data.supported_languages: 英文, 韓文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 法文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 俄文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Dual or AMD Equivalent
  • 顯示卡: HD Intel Graphics
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間

data.name: Love n Life: Happy Student
data.detailed_description:
💘Love n Life: Happy Student💘

At Reborn Entertainment, creativity drives everything we do as we’re committed to delivering fresh experiences. For us, fun isn’t just a goal, it’s the rule. 

⭐ Main Features

  • Experience dating through the unique Inventory Management system with over 300 unique items.

  • Complete the 5 main and 3 side girls' objectives to experience over 40 romantic moments with over 100 beautiful illustrations.

  • Beautiful girls come to life with Live2D animations.

  • Massive story content and secrets to explore, with more than 200 events.

  • Mini-games: Cooking, fishing, Sports, reading, and more.

  • Stay connected using social apps, texting, collections, taking photos, and a music player on your phone.

⭐ Innovative Gameplay

For the first time ever, inventory management meets dating-sim in a bold fusion that delivers a truly unique experience. Your items aren’t just for show. They shape how you engage in every conversation and win hearts, offering you a sensational experience like no other. Each person you encounter brings unique skills and persuasive strategies. Be prepared to adapt and respond to every challenge.

Master one of the traits, Confidence, Charm, Kindness, or Knowledge, for great replayability. Each unlocks over 300 powerful items with rich stats. Experiment, combine, and create thrilling builds for endless strategic fun. This addictive core gameplay promises countless hours of entertainment.

⭐ Story

You're a third-year college student living in the suburbs. After taking a competitive exam, you’re lucky enough to transfer to the prestigious Lingyun University, located on a small island not far from the mainland coast. The university boasts cutting-edge technology and frequently secures major project contracts with powerful corporations. The school itself also holds many secrets and hidden dramas waiting to be uncovered.

⭐ Romance

You're here to gain valuable knowledge… right? But don’t be surprised when the ladies can’t resist your charm. With over 40 romantic encounters, each more tempting than the last, you’ll find yourself drawn into sensational moments far more thrilling than textbooks. And if you’re daring enough to dig deeper, you might just uncover some hidden pleasures they don’t teach in class.

⭐ Social Activities

Beyond dating, master your lifestyle with activities like sports, fishing, art, and more. Level up your stats and use your new skills to impress the girls and unlock deeper intimacy.

⭐The ladies:

💘 Liu Yating - College Student

You're in the same class as a beautiful, carefree girl who loves to explore new things. She’s destined to become your best friend.

💘 Chen Meiling - Literature Professor

The literature teacher at your school and the dorm manager where you live. With her sweet, kind, and playful personality, she’s the teacher every student loves having in class!

💘 Qin Yilin - Student Council President

"Only knowledge and discipline create elite students. Without them, you're dust." The Student Council President is cool, elegant, and well-organized. She’s determined to push every student to reach their highest potential—no matter what it takes!

💘 Luna-3X - Virtual Assistant

She manages your schedule and informs you of important tasks that need to be done. She also helps with things better left unseen… all with a very glitchy personality.

💘 The Cafe Owner

She is your safe haven, offering a space of peace and sanctuary where you don’t have to worry about all the pressure a man is expected to carry on his shoulders.

💘 And Other Mysterious Ladies

The island’s full of surprises and the girls are the biggest ones. They’ll charm you, confuse you, maybe even scare you a little... all while dragging you into their delightful mess of mystery and mayhem. Your life’s not just getting turned upside down, but it will get a lot crazier than that...

data.short_description: Love n Life: Happy Student, a unique dating sim, incorporates inventory management for the first time. As a top-scoring third-year student, you are chosen to join the most prestigious college, where you’ll meet gorgeous ladies. Discover intriguing personalities and the school’s mysteries.
data.supported_languages: English, Korean, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, French, Portuguese - Brazil, Spanish - Latin America, Russian

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: windows 10
  • Processor: Intel Core 2 Dual or AMD Equivalent
  • Graphics: HD Intel Graphics
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 10 GB available space
